findings.message: Breaking schema change: field 'name' renamed to 'title' without backwards compatibility. Existing clients querying for 'name' will break.
findings.suggestion: Provide a migration path: keep 'name' as an alias or deprecated field alongside 'title' using @deprecated directive, or implement a versioned schema (v1/v2 endpoints) to support both naming conventions.
